testCases: TC1: input { level:10, basePower:20, type:"common", isBoss:false } → output { total:200, breakdown:{baseScore:200, multiplier:1, bossBonus:0, total:200} }
TC2: input { level:10, basePower:20, type:"elite", isBoss:false } → output { total:300, breakdown:{baseScore:200, multiplier:1.5, bossBonus:0, total:300} }
TC3: input { level:10, basePower:20, type:"legendary", isBoss:false } → output { total:400, breakdown:{baseScore:200, multiplier:2, bossBonus:0, total:400} }
TC4: input { level:10, basePower:20, type:"common", isBoss:true } → output { total:700, breakdown:{baseScore:200, multiplier:1, bossBonus:500, total:700} }
TC5: input { level:10, basePower:20, type:"elite", isBoss:true } → output { total:800, breakdown:{baseScore:200, multiplier:1.5, bossBonus:500, total:800} }
TC6: input { level:10, basePower:20, type:"legendary", isBoss:true } → output { total:900, breakdown:{baseScore:200, multiplier:2, bossBonus:500, total:900} }
TC7: input { level:0, basePower:20, type:"common", isBoss:false } → output { error: "Level must be > 0" }
TC8: input { level:10, basePower:-5, type:"common", isBoss:false } → output { error: "Base Power must be > 0" }
TC9: input { level:10, basePower:20, type:"rare", isBoss:false } → output { error: "Invalid NPC type: rare" }
TC10: input { level:10, basePower:20, type:"common", isBoss:"true" } → output { error: "isBoss must be a boolean" }
TC11: input { level:"", basePower:20, type:"common", isBoss:false } → output { error: "Level must be a number > 0" }
TC12: input { level:10, basePower:NaN, type:"common", isBoss:false } → output { error: "Base Power must be a number > 0" }
TC13: input { level:10, basePower:20, type:"ELITE", isBoss:false } → output { total:300, breakdown:{baseScore:200, multiplier:1.5, bossBonus:0, total:300} }
TC14: input { level:10, basePower:20, type:"  elite  ", isBoss:false } → output { total:300, breakdown:{baseScore:200, multiplier:1.5, bossBonus:0, total:300} }
TC15: input { level:5, basePower:50, type:"legendary", isBoss:false } → output { total:500, breakdown:{baseScore:250, multiplier:2, bossBonus:0, total:500} }
TC16: input { level:0.5, basePower:20, type:"common", isBoss:false } → output { total:10, breakdown:{baseScore:10, multiplier:1, bossBonus:0, total:10} }
TC17: input { level:10, basePower:20, isBoss:false } → output { error: "Missing required field: type" }
TC18: input { level:10, basePower:-3, type:"common", isBoss:false } → output { error: "Base Power must be > 0" }
TC19: input { level:1, basePower:1, type:"common", isBoss:false } → output { total:1, breakdown:{baseScore:1, multiplier:1, bossBonus:0, total:1} }
TC20: input { level:10.5, basePower:20.3, type:"elite", isBoss:false } → output { total:319.725, breakdown:{baseScore:213.15, multiplier:1.5, bossBonus:0, total:319.725} }
TC21: input { level:10, basePower:20, type:"common", isBoss:null } → output { error: "isBoss must be a boolean" }
TC22: input { basePower:20, type:"common", isBoss:false } → output { error: "Missing required field: level" }
